programs.title: Celebs Go Dating
programs.desc: It's Professor Green and David Potts' turn to dip their toes into the dating waters, but will they sink or swim? And our celebs enter their very first mixer.

programs.title: Gogglebox
programs.desc: The Goggleboxers watch Welcome to Wrexham, Love & Death, Animals Up Close with Bertie Gregory, Puzzling with Lucy Worsley, BBC News (escaped prisoner), and My Mum, Your Dad.

programs.title: First Dates: Valentine's Special
programs.desc: Comedian Vince, who usually only gets a Valentine's card from his mum, meets Brigitte Bardot lookalike Anna. Elaine's looking for a twinkle-toed gentleman. Does Steve have the right moves.

programs.title: Naked Attraction: All Out & Proud
programs.desc: This Pride special rides the rainbow and celebrates memorable singletons from across the sexual spectrum who've sashayed into the pods.

programs.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programs.desc: The couples have met their alternate matches. But now it's time for the real carnage: getting them to watch videos of how their spouses behaved.
